## Week in Review: 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-12

**One Nation** led search interest this week with an average score of 6.7.
The strongest combined search-and-sentiment score belonged to **One Nation**.

### Party Breakdown

- **Labor**: Avg interest 2.3 (-15.8% WoW), sentiment: neutral (-0.06)
- **Liberal**: Avg interest 2.0 (-33.3% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.23)
- **Greens**: Avg interest 1.4 (-23.1% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.38)
- **One Nation**: Avg interest 6.7 (-9.6% WoW), sentiment: positive (+0.18)
- **Animal Justice**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
- **Reason**: Avg interest 0.0 (0% WoW), sentiment: neutral (+0.00)
